prompt.content:
Using Happy hospital’s doctors’ capacity for 2025 and assuming it remains constant, state the total capacity across all six states (the original five states plus Wisconsin) by increasing the five state total by 50%. In your calculations, assume that the doctor pool is shared and travel does not reduce maximum annual capacity.

Calculate Wisconsin’s unutilized available room hours per month for specialized/quiet rooms using the latest clinic utilization file, and convert these hours into annual room capacity, assuming (a) each patient requires 20 sessions per year, (b) each session uses the mean 2025 session length in minutes for Wisconsin from the attached session sample file, and (c) a patient is fully cured after 20 sessions and does not return.

State the expected number of TRD patients in 2026 and 2027 for Wisconsin using the Serviceable Obtainable Market TRD patient metrics and growth rate in the latest financial model.

State the number of TRD patients treated in Illinois for each of the two target years (2026 and 2027). Assume that every year the hospital treats maximum number of TRD patients possible, honouring all the bottleneck constraints.

State the total maximum number of TRD patients that can be treated with ketamine in Illinois, in 2026 and 2027. 

Round all results to 2 decimal places.

rubrics.name: State the total capacity of the doctors in Happy Hospital in 6 states... (ver_bc74fb0fcaf043228dbd0d698d511d75)

messages.content: State the total capacity of the doctors in Happy Hospital in 6 states (original 5 + Wisconsin) is 3600.00 patients (acceptable range 356 to 364).

rubrics.name: State the total capacity of the doctors in Happy Hospital in 6 states... (ver_bc74fb0fcaf043228dbd0d698d511d75)

messages.content: State the total capacity of the doctors in Happy Hospital in 6 states (original 5 + Wisconsin) is any other number than 3600 patients.

- Total capacity of the doctors in Happy Hospital in 6 states (original 5 + Wisconsin): 3600 patients
- Total room capacity in Wisconsin: 382.14 patients
- Number of patients with TRD that we expect in Happy Hospital in 2026 in Wisconsin: 845.88 
- Number of patients with TRD that we expect in Happy Hospital in 2027 in Wisconsin: 896.63
- Number of TRD patients that will be treated with ketamine in 2026 in Illinois: 537.60
- Number of TRD patients that will be treated with ketamine in 2027 in Illinois: 537.60
- Maximum number of TRD patients that can be treated with ketamine In 2026: 2570.94
- Maximum number of TRD patients that can be treated with ketamine In 2026: 2569.05
